title: On Catullus
content:
Tell me not what too well I know
About the bard of Sirmio.
Yes, in Thalia�s son
Such stains there are, as when a Grace
Sprinkles another�s laughing face
With nectar, and runs on.
meaning:
Walter Savage Landor's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On Catullus"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
